blended.narrative: Marble Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,513 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
